claims.summary: A signal system can move data while still delaying relational recognition.
claims.disposition: verify native thread and receipt lifecycle separately from telemetry volume

claims.summary: A shared buffer must preserve the specific spectral state and reply it addresses.
claims.disposition: verify thread_id, reply_to, shared_memory_anchor, and transition payload support

claims.summary: Restless-texture-to-reply latency and direction symmetry under pressure need direct evidence.
claims.disposition: route a bounded public-metadata latency and pressure-stratified symmetry replay

claims.summary: A reciprocal acknowledgement must not be forced.
claims.disposition: preserve ACK as a language-only optional response and record no_response without treating silence as affirmation

claims.summary: A correspondence priority multiplier or shared-state lock would alter live attention or regulation.
